name: Bug report
about: Report a defect to help us improve the platform
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: ["bug", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Affected subsystem

Which layer or subsystem is affected?

- [ ] Digital Twin
- [ ] Predictive Intelligence
- [ ] Agentic AI
- [ ] Knowledge Intelligence (RAG)
- [ ] Workflow Engine
- [ ] MLOps
- [ ] Monitoring
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Deployment
- [ ] Observability
- [ ] Other / unsure

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened, including any error output (please redact secrets).

## Reproducibility

- [ ] Always
- [ ] Intermittent
- [ ] Unable to reproduce reliably

Because the platform is deterministic, please include the exact inputs and configuration used; a
deterministic reproduction greatly accelerates diagnosis.

## Environment

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| Platform version / commit | |
| Python version | |
| OS | |
| Deployment (local / Docker / Kubernetes) | |

## Additional context

Logs, configuration excerpts, or screenshots (redact sensitive data).
